title: Rhyming Detective
description: A picture-card rhyme game where kids listen for matching ending sounds.
learningGoals: Practice rhyme awareness through spoken CVC word pairs
Build phonological awareness without requiring reading
interactionModel: match-pairs tap two picture cards that rhyme
feedbackModel: Matching rhymes get sparkle SFX and a spoken rhyme line; a miss gets a gentle wiggle, spoken nudge, and retry.

modes.title: Find the Rhymes
modes.skill: rhyme awareness with familiar CVC pictures

modes.title: Tricky Rhymes
modes.skill: rhyme discrimination with less obvious CVC pictures

credits: Kaigani; shared QLOBE Kids object-card art. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
